title: notholaena muelleri
intro: Notholaena muelleri, also known as Mueller's feather fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Mueller's feather fern has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and has been shown to have potential benefits in wound healing and immune system support. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies for its purported health benefits.
